name: AKZO NOBEL NV AKZO NOBEL ORD SH
summary: Akzo Nobel N.V. is a global paints and coatings company and a major producer of specialty chemicals. They supply industries and consumers worldwide with innovative products and sustainable technologies designed to meet the growing demands of a fast-changing planet. Akzo Nobel is headquartered in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

name: NEOEN
summary: Neoen SA is a French independent power producer that develops, finances, builds, and operates renewable energy power plants. The company focuses on solar, wind, and energy storage projects, aiming to deliver clean and competitive energy. Neoen is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: Alcon AG
summary: Alcon AG is a global medical device company specializing in eye care products. They offer a wide range of products for surgical and vision care, including intraocular lenses, surgical equipment, contact lenses, and over-the-counter eye care products. Alcon is headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

name: KOJAMO OYJ KOJAMO ORD SHS
summary: Kojamo Oyj is a Finnish real estate investment company that focuses on providing rental apartments in Finnish growth centers. Their business model involves owning, managing, and developing high-quality rental apartments to meet the housing needs of urban residents. Kojamo is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: Citycon Oyj
summary: Citycon Oyj is a leading owner, manager, and developer of mixed-use urban centers in the Nordic countries and the Baltic region. They focus on locations offering daily necessities, services, and leisure activities, situated in urban hubs with strong demographics. Citycon is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: Beijer Ref AB Class B
summary: Beijer Ref AB is a Swedish technology-oriented trading group which, through its subsidiaries, offers refrigeration and air conditioning solutions to the wholesale market. The company provides a wide range of products, including compressors, heat exchangers, and control systems. Beijer Ref is headquartered in Malmö, Sweden.

name: Wihlborgs Fastigheter AB
summary: Wihlborgs Fastigheter AB is a Swedish real estate company that owns, manages, and develops commercial properties in the Öresund region. They focus on providing modern and flexible office and industrial spaces for businesses in attractive locations. Wihlborgs Fastigheter is headquartered in Malmö, Sweden.

name: AAK AB (PUBL) AAK ORD SHS
summary: AAK AB is a Swedish company that is a leading provider of value-adding vegetable oils and fats. They develop and provide solutions for food, chocolate and confectionery, cosmetics, pharmaceuticals, and other industries. AAK is headquartered in Malmö, Sweden.

name: SECTRA AB SECTRA ORD SHS CLASS
summary: Sectra AB is a Swedish medical technology company that provides IT systems and services for radiology, mammography, pathology, and other medical imaging departments. They also develop secure communication solutions for governments and defense organizations. Sectra is headquartered in Linköping, Sweden.

name: Valaris plc
summary: Valaris plc is an offshore drilling contractor providing drilling services for oil and gas wells worldwide. They own a fleet of drilling rigs, including drillships, semisubmersibles, and jackups, and offer services such as well construction, decommissioning, and project management, with headquarters in Houston, Texas.

name: MAERSK DRILLING A/S DRILLING CO
summary: MAERSK DRILLING A/S DRILLING CO is a drilling company that owns and operates a fleet of advanced drilling rigs. Their services include providing drilling solutions to oil and gas companies worldwide with a focus on harsh environments and deepwater operations. The company is headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark.

name: Anheuser-Busch InBev SA/NV Sponsored ADR
summary: ANHEUSER BUSCH INBEV NV ANHEUSE is a multinational beverage and brewing company that produces and distributes a vast portfolio of beer brands worldwide, including Budweiser, Corona, and Stella Artois. It is the world's largest brewer, with operations in numerous countries and headquarters in Leuven, Belgium.

name: Stillfront Group AB
summary: STILLFRONT GROUP AB (PUBL) STIL is a global group of independent creators, publishers, and distributors of digital games with a vision to create and publish games that people love. They develop and publish games across various platforms, including mobile, PC, and consoles, and operate from headquarters in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: HUAZHU GROUP LTD HUAZHU GROUP A
summary: HUAZHU GROUP LTD HUAZHU GROUP A is a leading hotel group in China, operating a multi-brand portfolio of hotels ranging from upscale to budget options. The company franchises and manages hotels under various brands to cater to different customer segments and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: KONINKLIJKE PHILIPS NV KONINKLI
summary: KONINKLIJKE PHILIPS NV KONINKLI is a diversified technology company focused on healthcare, personal health, and connected care. Philips develops and manufactures a range of products and services, including diagnostic imaging, patient monitoring, and personal care appliances, with headquarters in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

name: Lyft, Inc.
summary: LYFT INC LYFT ORD CLASS A (CDI) is a transportation network company that operates a ride-hailing platform connecting passengers with drivers. Lyft provides on-demand transportation services, including ridesharing, car rentals, and bike and scooter rentals, with headquarters in San Francisco, California.

name: Pinduoduo Inc.
summary: Pinduoduo Inc., through its subsidiaries, operates an e-commerce platform in the People's Republic of China. It operates Pinduoduo, a mobile platform that offers a range of products, including apparel, shoes, bags, mother and childcare products, food and beverage, fresh produce, electronic appliances, furniture and household goods, cosmetics and other personal care items, sports and fitness items, and auto accessories. The company was formerly known as Walnut Street Group Holding Limited and changed its name to Pinduoduo Inc. in July 2018. Pinduoduo Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.

name: Qudian Inc.
summary: Qudian Inc. provides online small consumer credit products in the People's Republic of China. It uses big data-enabled technologies, including artificial intelligence and machine learning to transform the consumer finance experience. The company offers small credit products, such as cash credit products; and merchandise credit products to finance borrowers' direct purchase of merchandise offered on its marketplace on installment basis. In addition, it operates a platform for loan recommendations and referrals services to third-party financial service providers. Qudian Inc. was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Xiamen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Sanofi
summary: Sanofi, a healthcare company, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of therapeutic solutions in the United States, Europe, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Pharmaceuticals, Vaccines, and Consumer Healthcare. The company provides specialty care products, including human monoclonal antibodies; products for multiple sclerosis, neurology, other inflammatory diseases, immunology, rare diseases, oncology, and rare blood disorders; medicines for diabetes; and cardiovascular and established prescription products. It also supplies poliomyelitis, pertussis, and hib pediatric vaccines; and influenza, adult booster, meningitis, and travel and endemic vaccines. In addition, the company offers allergy, cough and cold, pain, digestive, and nutritional products; and other products, such as daily body lotions, anti-itch products, moisturizing and soothing lotions, and body and foot creams, as well as powders for eczema. It also has various pharmaceutical products and vaccines in development stage. Sanofi has collaboration agreement with GlaxoSmithKline to develop a recombinant Covid-19 vaccine. The company was formerly known as Sanofi-Aventis and changed its name to Sanofi in May 2011. Sanofi was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: TELEFONICA SA TELEFONICA ADR RE
summary: TELEFONICA SA TELEFONICA ADR RE is a multinational telecommunications company providing mobile and fixed-line telephony, broadband, and digital services. It operates in Europe and Latin America, offering a wide range of communication and entertainment solutions to consumers and businesses, with headquarters in Madrid, Spain.

name: TotalEnergies SE
summary: TOTALENERGIES SE TOTAL ADR REPS is a broad energy company that produces and markets fuels, natural gas and electricity. It has operations in more than 130 countries and its headquarters is in Courbevoie, France.

name: ZTO Express (Cayman), Inc. Sponsored ADR Class A
summary: ZTO EXPRESS (CAYMAN) INC ZTO EX is a leading express delivery company in China, providing parcel delivery services through its extensive network. The company offers logistics and transportation solutions to e-commerce businesses and other industries, and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: BETSSON AB BETSSON ORD SHS CLAS
summary: BETSSON AB BETSSON ORD SHS CLAS is an online gaming company that offers a variety of online casino, sportsbook, and poker products. It operates several gaming brands and provides its services to customers around the world with headquarters in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: Musti Group Oyj
summary: MUSTI GROUP OYJ MUSTI GROUP ORD is a Nordic pet care company that offers a wide range of pet food, accessories, and services. The company operates retail stores and online channels, providing products and services for pet owners in the Nordic region with headquarters in Helsinki, Finland.

name: ILLIMITY BANK S.P.A. IN FORMA ABBREVIATA "ILLIMITY S.P.A."
summary: ILLIMITY BANK SPA ILLIMITY BANK is an Italian bank focused on providing financial services to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and specialized lending. It offers a range of banking products and services, including financing, investment, and advisory services, with headquarters in Milan, Italy.

name: MERCELL HOLDING AS MERCELL HOLD
summary: MERCELL HOLDING AS MERCELL HOLD is a provider of e-tendering and e-procurement solutions. They offer a cloud-based platform that connects buyers and suppliers in the public and private sectors with headquarters in Oslo, Norway.

name: BioNTech SE
summary: BioNTech SE, a biotechnology company, develops and commercializes immunotherapies for cancer and other infectious diseases. The company is involved in the developing of FixVac product candidates, including BNT111, which is in Phase I clinical trial for advance melanoma; BNT112 that is in Phase I/IIa trial for prostate cancer; BNT113, which is in Phase I/II trial to treat HPV+ head and neck cancers; BNT114 that is in Phase I clinical trial for triple negative breast cancer; BNT115 in a Phase I trial in ovarian cancer; and BNT116 for non-small cell lung cancer.It also develops neoantigen specific immunotherapies, such as Autogene cevumeran (BNT122), which is in Phase II clinical trial for first-line melanoma, as well as in Phase I clinical trial to treat multiple solid tumors; mRNA intratumoral immunotherapy comprising SAR441000 that is in Phase I clinical trial for solid tumors; and BNT141 and BNT142 to treat multiple solid tumors. In addition, the company develops RiboCytokines, which include BNT151, BNT152, and BNT153 for multiple solid tumors; chimeric antigen receptor T cell immunotherapies, such as BNT211 to treat multiple solid tumors, and BNT221 for other cancers; and checkpoint immunomodulators consisting of GEN1046 and GEN1042, which are in Phase I/II a clinical trial to treat multiple solid tumors. Further, it develops BNT321, an IgG1 monoclonal antibody, which is in Phase I/IIa clinical trial for pancreatic cancer; BNT411, small molecule immunomodulator product candidate for solid tumors; prophylactic vaccine for COVID-19 and Influenza; and infectious disease immunotherapies and rare disease protein replacement therapies. The company has collaborations with Genentech, Inc.; Sanofi S.A.; Genmab A/S; Genevant Sciences GmbH; Pfizer Inc.; Shanghai Fosun Pharmaceutical (Group) Co., Ltd.; and Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. BioNTech SE was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Mainz, Germany.

name: Nikola Corporation
summary: Nikola Corporation designs and manufactures battery electric and hydrogen-electric vehicless. It operates in two business units, Truck and Energy. The Truck business unit develops and commercializes battery electric vehicles, hydrogen fuel cell electric vehicles, vehicle components, and class 8 trucks that provide solutions to the short-haul, medium-haul, and long-haul trucking sector. The Energy business unit is focuses on developing and constructing a network of hydrogen fueling stations for its fuel-cell electric and other customers. Nikola Corporation was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona.

name: NOVAVAX INC NOVAVAX ORD SHS
summary: NOVAVAX INC NOVAVAX ORD SHS is a biotechnology company focused on developing and commercializing vaccines to prevent infectious diseases. It develops vaccine candidates using its proprietary recombinant nanoparticle technology and is headquartered in Gaithersburg, Maryland.

name: SEA LTD SEA ADS REPRESENTING OR
summary: SEA LTD SEA ADS REPRESENTING OR is a global consumer internet company that operates in e-commerce, digital entertainment, and financial services. Its key businesses include Shopee (e-commerce), Garena (digital entertainment), and SeaMoney (financial services), and is headquartered in Singapore.

name: CLOUDFLARE INC CLOUDFLARE ORD S
summary: CLOUDFLARE INC CLOUDFLARE ORD S is a global network that provides a range of services to improve the security, performance, and reliability of websites and applications. It offers solutions such as content delivery networks (CDNs), DDoS protection, and website optimization and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

name: MODERNA INC MODERNA ORD SHS
summary: MODERNA INC MODERNA ORD SHS is a biotechnology company pioneering messenger RNA (mRNA) therapeutics and vaccines to create a new generation of transformative medicines for patients. It develops mRNA medicines for infectious diseases, cancer, and rare genetic diseases and is headquartered in Cambridge, Massachusetts.

name: Dermapharm Hldg SE
summary: DERMAPHARM HOLDING SE DERMAPHAR is a pharmaceutical company that develops, produces, and distributes branded and generic pharmaceutical products, as well as other healthcare products. It focuses on dermatology and other therapeutic areas, offering a range of prescription and over-the-counter products, with headquarters in Grünwald, Germany.

name: ALLEGRO.EU SA ALLEGRO ORD SHS
summary: ALLEGRO.EU SA ALLEGRO ORD SHS is an e-commerce platform in Poland, connecting buyers and sellers for a wide variety of products. It is a leading online marketplace in Poland, offering a range of goods and services to consumers and businesses with headquarters in Warsaw, Poland.

name: HUSCOMPAGNIET OPERATIONS A/S HU
summary: HUSCOMPAGNIET OPERATIONS A/S HU is a Danish homebuilder specializing in designing and constructing single-family homes. They offer customizable house designs and construction services to customers throughout Denmark with headquarters in Horsens, Denmark.

name: RENEWCELL AB RENEWCELL ORD SHS
summary: RENEWCELL AB RENEWCELL ORD SHS is a Swedish company focused on developing and commercializing a technology to recycle textiles, specifically turning used cotton and other cellulose-based textiles into new raw materials. The company aims to create a sustainable textile industry by reducing waste and reliance on virgin materials and is headquartered in Sundsvall, Sweden.

name: Viatris, Inc.
summary: Viatris Inc., a healthcare company, develops, licenses, manufactures, markets, and distributes brand and generic drugs, complex generics, biosimilars, and active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) worldwide. The company operates through Developed Markets, Greater China, JANZ, and Emerging Markets segments. It offers drugs in various therapeutic areas, including infectious diseases and non-communicable diseases; HIV/AIDS; and oncology, immunology, endocrinology, ophthalmology, and dermatology, as well as antibacterial, central nervous system agents, antihistamines/antiasthmatics, cardiovascular, antivirals, antidiabetics, antifungals, and proton pump inhibitor areas. The company provides medicines, such as Wixela, Inhub, ADVAIR DISKUS, glatiramer acetate injection, Copaxone, and over the counter products in the form of oral solid doses, injectables, complex dosage forms, and APIs to retail and pharmacy establishments, wholesalers and distributors, payers, insurers and governments, and institutions; and support services, such as diagnostic clinics, educational seminars, and digital tools to help patients better manage their health. It distributes its products through pharmaceutical wholesalers/distributors, pharmaceutical retailers, institutional pharmacies, mail-order and e-commerce pharmacies, and specialty pharmacies. The company sells its products under the Lyrica, Lipitor, Creon, Influvac, Wixela Inhub, and EpiPen auto-injector; Norvasc and Viagra; AMITIZA, Lipacreon, and Effexor; Trastuzumab injection; and Celebrex and anti-retrovirals names, as well as offers biosimilars franchises, including Fulphila, Ogivri, and Hulio. Viatris Inc. has collaboration and licensing agreements with Revance Therapeutics, Inc.; Momenta Pharmaceuticals, Inc.; Theravance Biopharma, Inc.; Biocon Ltd.; and Fujifilm Kyowa Kirin Biologics Co. Ltd. The company was founded in 1961 and is based in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania.

name: C3AI INC C3 AI ORD SHS CLASS A
summary: C3AI INC C3 AI ORD SHS CLASS A is an enterprise AI software provider that delivers a comprehensive and scalable AI platform and applications for various industries. The company's solutions enable organizations to develop and deploy AI-powered applications for predictive maintenance, fraud detection, and other use cases, with headquarters in Redwood City, California.

name: Luckin Coffee, Inc. Sponsored ADR Class A
summary: Luckin Coffee Inc. engages in the retail sale of freshly brewed drinks, and pre-made food and beverage items in the People's Republic of China. It offers freshly brewed drinks, including freshly brewed coffee and non-coffee drinks; and food and beverage items, such as light meals. The company operates pick-up stores, relax stores, and delivery kitchens under the Luckin brand, as well as Luckin mobile app, Weixin mini-program, and other third-party platforms that cover the customer purchase process. As of March 31, 2019, it operated 2,370 stores, including 2,163 pick-up stores, 109 relax stores, and 98 delivery kitchens in 28 cities in the People's Republic of China. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in Xiamen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Nordnet AB
summary: NORDNET AB (PUBL) NORDNET ORD S is a Swedish online savings and investments platform that provides brokerage, banking, and pension services. It offers a range of investment products and tools to individuals in the Nordic region, enabling them to manage their savings and investments online with headquarters in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: LA FRANCAISE DES JEUX SA LA FRA
summary: LA FRANCAISE DES JEUX SA LA FRA is the French national lottery and gaming operator, offering a range of lottery games, sports betting, and other gaming products. The company operates through a network of retailers and online channels, generating revenue from ticket sales and gaming activities, with headquarters in Boulogne-Billancourt, France.

name: Snowflake, Inc.
summary: Snowflake Inc. provides cloud-based data platform in the United States and internationally. The company's platform offers Data Cloud, an ecosystem that enables customers to consolidate data into a single source of truth to drive meaningful business insights, build data-driven applications, and share data. Its platform is used by various organizations of various sizes in a range of industries. The company was formerly known as Snowflake Computing, Inc. and changed its name to Snowflake Inc. in April 2019. Snowflake Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in San Mateo, California.

name: VELODYNE LIDAR INC VELODYNE LID
summary: VELODYNE LIDAR INC VELODYNE LID is a technology company that develops and manufactures lidar sensors for autonomous vehicles, robotics, and mapping. Its products are used for object detection, navigation, and mapping in various applications, with headquarters in San Jose, California.

name: Carlsberg A/S
summary: Carlsberg A/S engages in the production and sale of beer and other beverage products in Western Europe, Eastern Europe, and Asia. It offers core, and craft and specialty beers; and alcohol-free brews. The company provides its products primarily under the Carlsberg, Tuborg, Ringnes, Lvivske, Wusu, 1664 Blanc, Grimbergen, Baltika, and other brand names. Carlsberg A/S also exports its products worldwide. The company was founded in 1847 and is headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark.

name: SALINI IMPREGILO SPA SALINI IMP
summary: SALINI IMPREGILO SPA SALINI IMP is an Italian industrial group specializing in the construction of major infrastructure projects worldwide. The company undertakes civil engineering projects such as roads, railways, dams, and bridges, and is headquartered in Milan, Italy.

name: Kesko Oyj
summary: Kesko Oyj provides trading sector services. The company operates through Grocery Trade, Building and Technical Trade, and Car Trade segments. The company's Grocery Trade segment is involved in the wholesale and B2B trade of groceries; and the retail sale of home and specialty goods in Finland. This segment operates approximately 1,236 K-food stores, including K-Citymarket, K-Supermarket, K-Market, and Neste K in Finland. Its Building and Technical Trade segment engages in the retail, wholesale, and B2B trade of building and home improvement, and electrical and HEPAC products, as well as trades in leisure goods. This segment operates approximately 562 stores through K-Rauta, K-Bygg, Byggmakker, K-Senukai, OMA, and Onninen names, as well as leisure goods trade chains through Intersport, Budget Sport, The Athlete's Foot, and Kookenk√É¬§ names in Finland, Sweden, Norway, the Baltic countries, Poland, and Belarus; and online stores. The company's Car Trade segment imports and markets Volkswagen, Audi, Seat, Bentley, and Porsche passenger cars, as well as Volkswagen and MAN commercial vehicles in Finland; and SEAT cars in Estonia and Latvia. It is also involved in car retailing activities; and the provision of servicing and after-sales services at its 17 retail outlets in Finland. The company was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: Stora Enso Oyj Class R
summary: Stora Enso Oyj provides renewable solutions for the packaging, biomaterials, wooden constructions, and paper industries worldwide. It operates through Packaging Materials, Packaging Solutions, Biomaterials, Wood Products, Forest, Paper, and Other segments. The company's Packaging Materials segment offers virgin and recycled fiber renewable and recyclable packaging materials for food and drink, pharmaceutical, and transport packaging. Its Packaging Solutions segment develops and sells fiber-based packaging products and services, including corrugated and other converting products, design services, automation solutions, and formed fiber and bio composites for various market sectors, such as store retail, e-commerce, and industrials. The company's Biomaterials segment provides various pulp grades for paper, board, tissue, textile, and hygiene product producers; and tall oil and turpentine from biomass. Its Wood Products segment offers wood-based solutions, including digital tools for designing of building projects; sawn woods; and pellets for sustainable heating, as well as applications for windows, doors, and packaging industries. The company's Forest segment engages in sustainable forest management, as well as supplies wood. Its Paper segment provides paper products for print and office use. The company's Other segment holds an interest in Pohjolan Voima Oy, a company that produces electricity and heat. It serves packaging manufacturers, brand owners, paper and board producers, publishers, retailers, printing houses, converters, joinery, and construction companies. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: AUTOGRILL SPA AUTOGRILL ORD SHS
summary: AUTOGRILL SPA AUTOGRILL ORD SHS is a multinational catering company that provides food and beverage services in airports, motorways, and railway stations. It operates restaurants, cafes, and retail outlets, offering a range of dining and shopping experiences to travelers with headquarters in Rozzano, Italy.

name: Austevoll Seafood ASA
summary: Austevoll Seafood ASA, a seafood company, engages in the salmon and trout, white fish, and pelagic businesses in Norway, the European Union, Eastern Europe, Africa, Asia, North America, South America, and Central America. The company is involved in the ownership and operation of fishing vessels, as well as farming, processing, sale, and distribution of salmon and trout. It also produces white fish products, fish meals, and fish oils; omega-3 oil; and canned and frozen fish products. The company was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Storeb√É¬∏, Norway. Austevoll Seafood ASA is a subsidiary of Laco AS.

name: DBXT X40 INAV DB X-TRACKERS CAC
Bank Polska Kasa Opieki S.A.
summary: BANK POLSKA KASA OPIEKI SA BANK is a Polish bank that offers a range of financial services to individuals and businesses. The bank provides retail and corporate banking products, including loans, deposits, and investment services, with headquarters in Warsaw, Poland.

name: Bavarian Nordic A/S
summary: Bavarian Nordic A/S develops, manufactures, and commercializes life-saving vaccines. The company offers non-replicating smallpox vaccines under the IMVAMUNE, IMVANEX, and JYNNEOS names; monkeypox under the JYNNEOS name; rabies vaccine for human use under the Rabipur/RabAvert name; tick-borne encephalitis vaccine under the Encepur name; and Ebola vaccine under the MVABEA name. It is also developing MVA-BN (freeze-dried) that is in Phase III clinical trials for the treatment of smallpox; MVA-BN RSV, which is in Phase II clinical trials for the treatment of respiratory syncytial virus; ABNCoV2 that is in Phase I/II clinical trial for the treatment of SARS-CoV-2; TAEK-VAC, which is in Phase I/II clinical trial for treatment of advanced HER2- and brachyury-expressing cancers; and MVA-BN WEV that is in Phase I clinical trial for treating Equine encephalitis.It has license and collaboration agreement with AdaptVac; and license agreements with National Cancer Institute and Public Health Service. The company operates in the United States, Germany, the Netherlands, Sweden, Switzerland, Austria, the United Kingdom, Japan, Canada, and internationally. Bavarian Nordic A/S was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Hellerup, Denmark.

name: Bechtle AG
summary: BECHTLE AG BECHTLE ORD SHS is an IT service provider that offers solutions for IT infrastructure and IT management. The company provides consulting, system integration, and outsourcing services to businesses and public sector clients with headquarters in Neckarsulm, Germany.

name: Proximus SA
summary: PROXIMUS NV PROXIMUS ORD SHS is a Belgian telecommunications company providing fixed and mobile telephony, internet, and television services. The company serves residential and business customers in Belgium and internationally and is headquartered in Brussels, Belgium.

name: BEIERSDORF AG BEIERSDORF ORD SH
summary: BEIERSDORF AG BEIERSDORF ORD SH is a German personal care company that manufactures and markets a range of skin and beauty care products. Its brands include Nivea, Eucerin, and La Prairie and its headquartered in Hamburg, Germany.

name: BONHEUR ASA BONHEUR ORD SHS
summary: BONHEUR ASA BONHEUR ORD SHS is a Norwegian investment company with interests in renewable energy, shipping, offshore drilling, and media. It operates through its subsidiaries, focusing on sustainable investments and long-term value creation with headquarters in Oslo, Norway.

name: Biesse S.p.A.
summary: BIESSE SPA BIESSE ORD SHS is an Italian manufacturer of woodworking and advanced materials processing machinery. The company designs, manufactures, and distributes machinery and systems for furniture, construction, and other industries with headquarters in Pesaro, Italy.

name: BORUSSIA DORTMUND GMBH & CO KGA
summary: BORUSSIA DORTMUND GMBH & CO KGA is a German football club that participates in the Bundesliga, the top tier of German football. The club generates revenue from matchday sales, broadcasting rights, sponsorships, and merchandise and is located in Dortmund, Germany.

name: BANK ZACHODNI WBK SA BANK ZACHO
summary: BANK ZACHODNI WBK SA BANK ZACHO is a Polish bank that provides retail, corporate, and investment banking services. It offers a range of financial products and services to individuals, businesses, and institutions and is headquartered in Warsaw, Poland.

name: ChemoMetec A/S
summary: CHEMOMETEC A/S CHEMOMETEC ORD S is a Danish biotech company that develops, manufactures and markets cell counting and analysis instruments. The company provides solutions for cell counting, viability determination, and other cell analysis applications in research and development, with headquarters in Allerod, Denmark.

name: DBX II EUZN GOV BOND YD PLUS 1-
CHARGEURS SA CHARGEURS ORD SHS
summary: CHARGEURS SA is a France-based company specializing in specialty textiles and protective films, as well as providing services. They operate through divisions like Chargeurs Protective Films, Chargeurs PCC Fashion Technologies, and Chargeurs Luxury Materials, providing solutions across various industries. The company is headquartered in Paris, France.

Their products are used in retail, manufacturing, transportation and logistics, and healthcare industries. The company is headquartered in Calderara di Reno, Italy.

name: LYXOR USD LQD INVMNT GRD CRPRT
DE LONGHI SPA DE'LONGHI ORD SHS
summary: De' Longhi S.p.A. is an Italian small appliance manufacturer based in Treviso, Italy. The company is famous for its range of espresso makers, ice cream makers, air conditioners and portable heaters, and also sells appliances under the Kenwood and Braun brands. The company operates globally offering products in cooking, comfort and home care.

name: DRILLISCH AG DRILLISCH ORD SHS
summary: Drillisch AG, now known as 1&1 Drillisch AG, is a German telecommunications provider offering mobile and fixed-network services. The company operates as a virtual network operator (MVNO) providing services under various brands including 1&1. Drillisch is headquartered in Maintal, Germany.

name: DEVOTEAM SA DEVOTEAM ORD SHS
summary: DEVOTEAM SA is a France-based consulting company that provides IT consulting services to businesses. The company's services include digital strategy consulting, technology implementation, and managed services. Devoteam has its headquarters in Levallois-Perret, France.

name: Kambi Group plc
summary: Kambi Group plc operates as a business-to-business supplier of managed sports betting services to business-to-consumer gaming operators in Europe, the Americas, and internationally. It offers services, including compliance, odds-compiling, customer intelligence, and risk management services built on an in-house developed software platform. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Ta' Xbiex, Malta.

name: ENAGAS SA ENAGAS ORD SHS
summary: Enagás SA is a Spanish natural gas transmission system operator and the technical manager of the Spanish gas system. The company is responsible for operating and maintaining the Spanish gas infrastructure, including gas pipelines, storage facilities, and regasification plants. Enagás is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.

name: YANDEX NV YANDEX ORD SHS CLASS
summary: Yandex N.V. is a Dutch-Russian company providing Internet-related services and products. These include a search engine, online advertising, e-commerce, navigation, mobile applications, and other services in Russia and other countries. While incorporated in the Netherlands, its primary operations are in Russia.

name: Finnair Oyj
summary: Finnair Oyj engages in the airline business in Europe and Asia. It also offers package tours under the Aurinkomatkat-Suntours and Finnair Holidays brand names. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated a fleet of 59 aircraft, which included 30 owned by Finnair Aircraft Finance Oy and 29 under lease. In addition, it provides technical, catering, and financial business services. The company was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Vantaa, Finland.

name: Audax Renovables SA
summary: Audax Renovables SA, formerly FERSA Energías Renovables SA, is a Spanish independent power producer that generates electricity from renewable sources, including wind, solar, and hydro energy. The company is involved in the development, construction, and operation of renewable energy plants. Audax Renovables is headquartered in Barcelona, Spain.

name: LISI SA LISI ORD SHS
summary: LISI SA is a France-based global industrial group specializing in the manufacturing of high value-added assembly solutions and components. The company operates in three main sectors: Aerospace, Automotive, and Medical. LISI is headquartered in Grandvillars, France.

name: GIMV INVESTERINGSMAATSCHAPPIJ V
summary: GIMV is a Belgian investment company that provides venture capital and private equity to companies in the Benelux region and surrounding countries. They invest in a variety of sectors including healthcare, life sciences, technology, and sustainable cities. The company is headquartered in Antwerp, Belgium.

name: Innate Pharma
summary: Innate Pharma SA is a French biotechnology company dedicated to discovering, developing and commercializing first-in-class immunotherapies for cancer. The company's focus is on exploiting the innate immune system to fight cancer. Innate Pharma is headquartered in Marseille, France.

name: Interpump Group S.p.A.
summary: Interpump Group S.p.A. is an Italian manufacturer of high-pressure piston pumps, hydraulic components, and electric motors. The company operates globally and serves various industries including cleaning, industrial, and agricultural sectors. Interpump Group is headquartered in Sant'Ilario d'Enza, Italy.

name: JERONIMO MARTINS SGPS SA JERONI
summary: Jerónimo Martins SGPS, SA is a Portuguese international food industry corporation that operates supermarkets and hypermarkets. The company operates mainly in Portugal, Poland, and Colombia, with brands like Pingo Doce and Biedronka. Jerónimo Martins is headquartered in Lisbon, Portugal.

name: JUNGHEINRICH AG JUNGHEINRICH PR
summary: Jungheinrich AG is a German company that manufactures and supplies intralogistics solutions, including forklift trucks, warehouse technology, and material flow systems. The company offers a wide range of products and services for warehousing and material handling. Jungheinrich is headquartered in Hamburg, Germany.

name: KWS SAAT SE & Co KGaA
summary: KWS SAAT SE is a German company specializing in plant breeding, producing and selling seeds for various crops, including sugar beet, corn, cereals, and oil and protein plants. The company conducts research and development in plant breeding and biotechnology. KWS SAAT is headquartered in Einbeck, Germany.

name: KLEPIERRE SA KLEPIERRE REIT
summary: Klépierre SA is a French real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in shopping centers across Europe. The company owns, manages, and develops a portfolio of retail properties in major European cities. Klépierre is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: Neles Oyj
summary: Neles Oyj provides flow control solutions and services worldwide. It offers control, on-off, emergency shutdown, butterfly, ball, globe, segment, and eccentric rotary plug valves; pneumatic, electric, and manual actuators; limit switches; and valve controllers, as well as valve parts. The company also provides valve repairs and maintenance, PID tuning and process control, and maintenance planning and lifecycle services. It offers its products to chemicals, energy, gas processing and LNG, industrial gas, marine, mining, metals and steel processing, pipeline, pulp, paper and bioproducts, refining, and water and wastewater industries. The company was formerly known as Metso Oyj. Neles Oyj was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Vantaa, Finland.

name: MELEXIS NV MELEXIS ORD SHS
summary: Melexis NV is a Belgian microelectronics company that designs, develops, tests and markets advanced integrated semiconductor devices. The company's products are primarily used in the automotive industry, but also in other industries such as industrial, medical and consumer electronics. Melexis is headquartered in Tessenderlo, Belgium.

name: Mota-Engil SGPS SA
summary: Mota-Engil SGPS SA is a Portuguese construction and engineering group operating in the areas of infrastructure, environment and services. The company is involved in construction, civil engineering, public works, waste management, and other related activities. Mota-Engil is headquartered in Porto, Portugal.

name: NOKIAN TYRES PLC NOKIAN RENKAAT
summary: Nokian Tyres PLC is a Finnish tire manufacturer that develops and produces tires for cars, trucks, buses, and heavy machinery. The company is known for its winter tires and operates globally. Nokian Tyres is headquartered in Nokia, Finland.

name: Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA
summary: Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA, together with its subsidiaries, provides scheduled and charter airline services in Norway and internationally. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated a total of 131 aircraft, whereas 55 owned and 76 leased aircrafts with a route network across Europe into North Africa, the Middle East, North America, South America, and South-East Asia. It is also involved in aircraft financing, leasing, and ownership activities; and cargo activities. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Fornebu, Norway.

name: GREEK ORGANISATION OF FOOTBALL
summary: GREEK ORGANISATION OF FOOTBALL is likely the governing body for professional football in Greece. It is responsible for organizing and overseeing football leagues and competitions in the country. The organization sets rules and regulations for the sport and manages the development of football in Greece.

name: Orkla ASA
summary: Orkla ASA engages in branded consumer goods, and industrial and financial investment businesses. The company offers branded products, including frozen pizza, ketchup, soups, sauces, bread toppings, and ready-to-eat meals through grocery retail trade, as well as the out-of-home, convenience store, and petrol station sectors. It also provides confectionery, biscuit, and snack products; and develops bran and crispbread products, as well as snack meals. In addition, the company offers personal care and cleaning products; dietary supplement, sport nutrition, and weight control products; wound care products and first aid equipment; painting tools; basic garments; and professional cleaning products. Further, it operates Gymgrossisten and Bodystore e-commerce portals for health and sports nutrition products; and restaurants. Additionally, the company supplies margarine and butter blends, bread and cake improvers and mixes, yeast, marzipan, and ice cream ingredients; produces and supplies hydro power to the Nordic power market; and develops and sells real estate properties. It offers its food products under the Grandiosa, TORO, Stabburet, Felix, Paul√É¬∫ns, Abba, Kalles, Beauvais, Den Gamle Fabrik, Spilva, Vitana and MTR brands; confectionery and snacks under the KiMs, Nidar, Stratos, G√É¬∂teborgs Kex, S√É¬¶tre, OLW, Panda, Laima, Selga, Taffel, Adazu, and Kalev brands; care products under the Zalo, Jif, Sun, Define, Sunsilk, Blenda, M√É¬∂ller's, Collett, Nutrilett, Maxim, Norgesplaster, Salvequick, Riemann, Jordan, and Pierre Robert brands; and food ingredients under the Odense Marcipan, Mors hjemmebakte, KronJ√É¬§st, Bakkedal, and Naturli' brands. It has operations in Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Iceland, the Baltics, rest of Europe, and internationally. The company is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Outokumpu Oyj
summary: Outokumpu Oyj produces and sells various stainless steel products in Finland, other European countries, North America, the Asia-Pacific, and internationally. It offers cold rolled coils, strips, and sheets; precision strips; hot rolled coils, strips, and plates; quarto plates; semi-finished stainless steel long products; stainless steel wire rods, drawn wire, bars, and rebars; welded stainless steel I-beams, H-beams, hollow-section tubes, and bent profiles for load-bearing structures; suction roll shell blanks; blancs and discs; and customized press plates and ready-to-use plates. The company also provides various grades of ferrochrome; and by-products, such as OKTO insulation and aggregates, and croval. Its products are used in various applications, including commercial kitchen, cooking, food industry, and home appliances; automotive and transportation; building and infrastructure; and energy and heavy industries. Outokumpu Oyj was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: PATRIZIA IMMOBILIEN AG PATRIZIA
summary: PATRIZIA Immobilien AG is a German investment management company focused on real estate investments throughout Europe. They acquire, manage and sell residential and commercial properties for institutional and private investors. The company is headquartered in Augsburg, Germany.

name: Piaggio & C Spa Pontedera
summary: Piaggio & C. S.p.A. is an Italian motor vehicle manufacturer, best known for its Vespa scooters. The company manufactures a range of two-wheeled motor vehicles, including scooters, motorcycles, and mopeds, as well as commercial vehicles. Piaggio is headquartered in Pontedera, Italy.

name: POLSKI KONCERN NAFTOWY ORLEN SA
summary: Polski Koncern Naftowy ORLEN S.A., commonly known as PKN ORLEN, is a Polish multinational oil and gas company. It is involved in the refining, distribution, and sale of petroleum products, as well as petrochemicals and energy production. PKN ORLEN is headquartered in Płock, Poland.

name: POWSZECHNA KASA OSZCZEDNOSCI BA
summary: Powszechna Kasa Oszczędności Bank Polski Spółka Akcyjna, commonly known as PKO Bank Polski, is a Polish universal bank. It offers a range of financial services including retail banking, corporate banking, and investment banking. PKO Bank Polski is headquartered in Warsaw, Poland.

name: Pfeiffer Vacuum Technology AG
summary: Pfeiffer Vacuum Technology AG develops, manufactures, and markets components and systems for vacuum generation, measurement, and analysis. The company also provides helium leak detectors. Its solutions include magnetic and hybrid bearing turbo pumps, and turbo pumping stations; rotary vane pumps, diaphragms, roots, side channels, screws, piston and scroll pumps; vacuum chambers; leak detectors, gas analyzers, gauges, and mass spectrometers; gaskets, filters, valves, flanges, electrical feedthroughs, manipulators, bellows components, and other accessories; and multi-stage vacuum systems, special pumping stations, and calibration and decontamination systems; and flexible services and consultation. It serves analytics, industrial, research and development, coating, and semiconductor markets in Europe, the United States, and Asia. The company markets and distributes its products through its own network of sales companies and independent marketing agents. Pfeiffer Vacuum Technology AG was founded in 1890 and is headquartered in Asslar, Germany.

name: SalMar ASA
summary: SalMar ASA, an aquaculture company, produces and sells farmed salmon in Asia, the United States, Canada, Norway, rest of Europe, and internationally. It is involved in the broodfish, lumpfish, and smolt production; and marine-phase farming, harvesting, packaging, processing, and sale of farmed salmon. The company sells its products to importers/exporters, processing companies, and retail chains through in-house sales force and/or through partners. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Kverva, Norway.

name: KOENIG & BAUER AG KOENIG & BAUE
summary: Koenig & Bauer AG is a German printing press manufacturer. The company provides printing solutions for various applications including banknotes, packaging, newspapers, and commercial printing. Koenig & Bauer is headquartered in Würzburg, Germany.

name: SOFINA SA SOFINA ORD SHS
summary: Sofina SA is a Belgian investment company with a diverse portfolio of investments in private and public companies. The company invests across various sectors including digital transformation, consumer goods, education, and healthcare. Sofina is headquartered in Brussels, Belgium.

name: SUEDZUCKER AG SUEDZUCKER AG ORD
summary: Südzucker AG is a German sugar producer. The company is one of the largest sugar producers in the world and is also involved in the production of other food ingredients and animal feed. Südzucker is headquartered in Mannheim, Germany.

name: Telenor ASA
summary: Telenor ASA, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a telecommunication company worldwide. Its principal products and services include mobile communication, fixed line communication, and broadcasting services. The company's mobile communication services comprise voice, data, Internet, and content services, as well as customer equipment and messaging. Its fixed line services consist of telephony, Internet and TV, and leased lines, as well as data and managed services; and broadcasting and data communication services through satellite, terrestrial radio, and TV transmission. The company also provides machine-to-machine communication, as well as internet based services and financial services. Telenor ASA was founded in 1855 and is headquartered in Fornebu, Norway.

name: TREVI FINANZIARIA INDUSTRIALE S
summary: Trevi - Finanziaria Industriale S.p.A. is an Italian industrial group specialized in foundation engineering, soil consolidation, and drilling. The company operates through its subsidiaries Trevi, Soilmec, and Petreven, providing services and equipment for specialized engineering projects. Trevi is headquartered in Cesena, Italy.

name: TAMBURI INVESTMENT PARTNERS SPA
summary: Tamburi Investment Partners S.p.A. (TIP) is an Italian investment and merchant bank focused on investing in small and medium-sized enterprises. They provide financial advisory and investment services. The company is headquartered in Milan, Italy.

name: PowerCell Sweden AB
summary: PowerCell Sweden AB is a Swedish company that develops and manufactures fuel cell stacks and systems. Their products are primarily used for power generation in stationary and mobile applications. PowerCell is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.

name: MEDIASET ESPANA COMUNICACION SA
summary: Mediaset España Comunicación SA is a Spanish media company that operates television channels and produces content. The company's channels include Telecinco, Cuatro, and Factoría de Ficción. Mediaset España is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.

name: Telenet Group Holding NV
summary: Telenet Group Holding NV provides basic and enhanced video services to residential and business customers in Belgium and Luxembourg. The company offers basic video services, including basic cable television services; enhanced video services, including premium sports and film channels, a range of extended thematic channels, and a selection of films and broadcast contents; broadband Internet services; fixed-line and mobile telephony voice and data services; interconnection services; and value-added services, such as hosting, managed security, and cloud services. The company also sells mobile handsets and set-top boxes; and provides product activation and installation services. As of December 31, 2020, it served 1,811,700 basic and enhanced video customers; 1,697,100 broadband internet subscribers; and 1,171,800 fixed-line telephony subscribers, as well as 2,815,700 mobile subscribers. Telenet Group Holding NV was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Mechelen, Belgium. Telenet Group Holding NV is a subsidiary of Liberty Global plc.

name: TAKKT AG
summary: TAKKT AG is a German holding company specializing in the business equipment sector. The company provides a range of products and services including office furniture, shop equipment, and packaging materials through its various subsidiaries. TAKKT is headquartered in Stuttgart, Germany.

name: LEOVEGAS AB (PUBL) LEOVEGAS ORD
summary: LeoVegas AB (publ) is a Swedish mobile gaming company that provides online casino and sports betting services. The company operates through its LeoVegas and Royal Panda brands. LeoVegas is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: Paradox Interactive AB
summary: Paradox Interactive AB (publ) is a Swedish video game publisher and developer. The company is known for its strategy games such as Crusader Kings, Europa Universalis, and Hearts of Iron. Paradox Interactive is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: Veidekke ASA
summary: Veidekke ASA is a Norwegian construction and civil engineering company. The company undertakes projects in building construction, infrastructure, and industrial construction. Veidekke is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: CLIMEON AB (PUBL) CLIMEON ORD S
summary: Climeon AB (publ) is a Swedish clean-tech company that has developed a technology that converts low-temperature heat into electricity. The company's Heat Power technology can be used in various industries including geothermal, waste heat recovery, and industrial processes. Climeon is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.

name: WashTec AG
summary: WashTec AG is a German company that manufactures vehicle washing equipment. The company provides car wash systems, bus and truck wash systems, and self-service washing stations. WashTec is headquartered in Augsburg, Germany.

name: WUESTENROT & WUERTTEMBERGISCHE
summary: Wüstenrot & Württembergische AG is a German financial services group that provides building society savings, insurance, and banking services. The company operates through its Wüstenrot Bausparkasse and Württembergische Versicherung brands. Wüstenrot & Württembergische is headquartered in Stuttgart, Germany.

name: LEROY SEAFOOD GROUP ASA LEROY S
summary: Leroy Seafood Group ASA is a Norwegian seafood company involved in the production, processing, and distribution of salmon and trout. The company operates through its various subsidiaries, providing products to markets worldwide. Leroy Seafood Group is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.

name: KNOWIT AB (PUBL) KNOW IT ORD SH
summary: Knowit AB (publ) is a Swedish IT consulting company. The company provides services in IT strategy, digitalization, and application development. Knowit is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: Clas Ohlson AB Class B
summary: Clas Ohlson AB is a Swedish retail company that sells hardware, electrical, multimedia, home and leisure products. The company operates through its stores and online channels. Clas Ohlson is headquartered in Insjön, Sweden.

name: KUNGSLEDEN AB KUNGSLEDEN ORD SH
summary: Kungsleden AB is a Swedish real estate company that owns, manages, and develops commercial properties. The company focuses on office, retail, and industrial properties in Sweden. Kungsleden is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: Biotage AB
summary: Biotage AB (publ), a life science company, provides separation technologies in the areas of organic and analytical chemistry, biomolecules, as well as for industrial scale up applications. It offers sample preparation solutions; horizon food and environmental products; microwave synthesis solutions; peptide synthesis and purification solutions; flash purification products; work-up products; evaporation and concentration solutions; and industrial and large scale products, such as flash purification, metal scavenging, reagents and scavengers, and custom resins. The company sells its products to pharmaceutical and biotechnical companies, contract research and manufacturing organizations, government authorities, and academic institutions; and commercial labs, hospital, CROs, bio-analytical laboratories, food manufacturers, and labs performing for food safety and environmental analysis. It operates in North and South America, Europe, Japan, China, South Korea, India, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia Pacific. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Uppsala, Sweden.

name: RaySearch Laboratories AB Class B
summary: RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) is a Swedish medical technology company that develops software for radiation therapy of cancer. The company's RayStation treatment planning system is used in cancer clinics worldwide. RaySearch Laboratories is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: CASTELLUM AB CASTELLUM ORD SHS
summary: Castellum AB is a Swedish real estate company that owns, manages, and develops commercial properties in Sweden and the Nordic region. The company focuses on office, retail, logistics, and industrial properties. Castellum is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.

name: DIOS FASTIGHETER AB DIOS FASTIG
summary: DIOS Fastigheter AB is a Swedish real estate company that owns and manages residential properties in Sweden. The company focuses on properties in university and college towns. DIOS Fastigheter is headquartered in Uppsala, Sweden.

name: BIOGAIA AB BIOGAIA ORD SHS
summary: BioGaia AB is a Swedish biotechnology company that develops, markets and sells probiotic products. The company's products are used in dietary supplements, infant formula, and other applications. BioGaia is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: GVS S.P.A GVS SPA
summary: GVS S.p.A is an Italian company specializing in the production of filters and components for applications in the healthcare, life sciences, automotive, appliance, and industrial sectors. The company develops and manufactures a range of filtration solutions, including filters, plastic components, and integrated systems. GVS is headquartered in Bologna, Italy.

name: CATENA AB CATENA ORD SHS
summary: Catena AB is a Swedish real estate company that owns, manages, and develops logistics properties. The company focuses on properties located in strategic locations for logistics and distribution. Catena is headquartered in Helsingborg, Sweden.

name: NOBIA AB NOBIA ORD SHS
summary: Nobia AB is a Swedish kitchen manufacturer. The company designs, manufactures, and sells kitchens through its various brands including Magnet, HTH, and Poggenpohl. Nobia is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: HUFVUDSTADEN AB HUFVUDSTADEN A
summary: Hufvudstaden AB is a Swedish real estate company that owns and manages commercial properties in central Stockholm and Gothenburg. The company's portfolio primarily consists of retail and office properties. Hufvudstaden is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: Grieg Seafood ASA
summary: Grieg Seafood ASA, through its subsidiaries, operates as a fish farming company. It engages in the production and sale of Atlantic salmon. The company supplies its fish products to customers in the European Union, the United Kingdom, the United States, Canada, Asia, and other markets. Grieg Seafood ASA was founded in 1884 and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.

name: L E LUNDBERGFORETAGEN AB (PUBL)
summary: L E Lundbergföretagen AB (publ) is a Swedish investment company. The company invests in a range of companies in various sectors including real estate, packaging, and industry. L E Lundbergföretagen is headquartered in Norrköping, Sweden.

name: SAAB AB SAAB B ORD SHS
summary: Saab AB is a Swedish aerospace and defense company. The company develops and manufactures military aircraft, defense systems, and security solutions. Saab is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: BILLERUDKORSNAS AB (PUBL) BILLE
summary: BillerudKorsnäs AB (publ) is a Swedish pulp and paper company. The company produces packaging materials and solutions from renewable raw materials. BillerudKorsnäs is headquartered in Solna, Sweden.

name: Ackermans & Van Haaren NV
summary: Ackermans & Van Haaren NV engages in the marine engineering and contracting, private banking, real estate and senior care, and energy and resources businesses worldwide. The company operates through five segments: Marine Engineering & Contracting, Private Banking, Real Estate & Senior Care, Energy & Resources, and AvH & Growth Capital. It engages in the marine construction activities, including dredging and civil works on water, as well as offshore activities in the area of renewable energy, oil and gas, soil and sludge remediation, and aggregate and mineral harvesting; real estate development activities; and development of port projects and port-linked industrial zones, as well as offshore wind farms. The company also offers asset management services for various private clients; advisory banking services for entrepreneurs and liberal professions; and car finance and financial car leasing services through distributors. In addition, it develops residential and mixed projects; invests in retail and office properties; provides accommodation and care for the elderly; and operates retirement homes. Further, the company produces crude palm oil, rubber, banana, and tea products; manufactures cement; and offers advice, automation, and maintenance services for life science, tank terminal, food and beverage, infrastructure, and chemistry markets. Ackermans & Van Haaren NV was founded in 1876 and is headquartered in Antwerp, Belgium.

name: Varta AG
summary: Varta AG, through its subsidiaries, researches, develops, produces, and sells microbatteries, household batteries, and energy storage solutions worldwide. It operates through two segments, Microbatteries & Solutions and Household batteries. The Microbatteries & Solutions segment offers zinc-air batteries for use in hearing aid devices; lithium-ion battery solutions for wireless headphones, and other wearable applications, as well as for electrical devices, including Bluetooth headsets and medical devices for measuring high blood pressure, blood sugar, and other bodily functions, as well as power supply for Covid-19 antibody tests; and rechargeable battery solutions for use in applications, such as servers, car keys, alarm systems and smart meters, and others for industrial and original equipment manufacturers. This segment is also involved in the development, system integration, and assembly of rechargeable battery packs for portable industrial, communication, electric power tool, home and garden, and medical applications; and energy storage devices for private households and commercial applications. The Household batteries segment offers household batteries, rechargeable batteries, chargers, power banks, lights, and energy storage systems. The company was founded in 1887 and is headquartered in Ellwangen, Germany. Varta AG is a subsidiary of Montana Tech Components AG.

name: Ion Beam Applications S.A.
summary: Ion Beam Applications SA develops, manufactures, and supports medical devices and software solutions for cancer treatments in Belgium, the United States, and internationally. The company operates through Proton Therapy and Other Accelerators, and Dosimetry segments. The Proton Therapy and Other Accelerators segment develops, fabricates, and services medical and industrial particle accelerators, and proton therapy systems. This segment also offers turnkey solutions for the treatment of cancer through the use of proton beams; and a line of cyclotrons used for the production of positron emission tomography or SPECT radioisotopes, as well as a line of industrial accelerators for sterilization and ionization. The Dosimetry segment provides solutions and services that enhances efficiency and minimizes errors in radiation therapy and medical imaging quality assurance and calibration procedures. Ion Beam Applications SA was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Louvain-la-Neuve, Belgium.

name: Getinge AB
summary: Getinge AB provides products and solutions for operating rooms, intensive-care units, sterilization departments, and life science companies and institutions. The company operates through Acute Care Therapies, Life Science, and Surgical Workflows segments. It offers sterile transfer systems, closure processing systems, washers, isolators, sterilizers, and logistic automation solutions; practice-oriented monitoring systems and disposables, vascular and cardiothoracic surgery solutions, anesthesia machines, beating heart surgery solutions, ceiling supply units, connected solutions, and indicators, as well as washer-disinfectors, consumables, and IT-solutions. The company also provides endovascular products; chest drain products; endoscope reprocessing; endoscopic vessel harvesting systems; ventilators; extracorporeal life support or extracorporeal membrane oxygenation products; intra-aortic balloon counter pulsation therapies; operating lights; and modular room systems. In addition, it offers operating tables and accessories; operating room (OR) furniture; OR integration systems; OR management solutions; loading and distribution trolleys; patient flow management and transport solutions; sealing equipment; sterile supply management and traceability solutions; surgical perfusion components; surgical assist systems; and trays and baskets, as well as inspection and packaging and after sales consulting services. Further, the company provides professional financial advisory services to hospitals and medical facilities; and education and training services. It offers its products through a network of proprietary sales companies, as well as through agents and distributors in the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia Pacific. Getinge AB was founded in 1904 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.

name: DiaSorin S.p.A.
summary: Diasorin S.p.A. is an Italian biotechnology company that develops, produces, and markets in vitro diagnostic tests. They focus on immunodiagnostics and molecular diagnostics, offering a wide range of tests for infectious diseases, bone metabolism, and other clinical areas. Diasorin is headquartered in Saluggia, Italy.

name: Sweco AB Class B
summary: SWECO AB is a European engineering and architecture consultancy company that provides services in urban development, transportation, energy, water, and environment. The company offers planning, design, and project management services to public and private sector clients. SWECO AB is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: INDUSTRIVARDEN AB
summary: Industrivärden AB is a Swedish investment company that manages a portfolio of listed Nordic companies. The company's investment strategy focuses on long-term ownership and active participation in its portfolio companies. Industrivärden is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: OREXO AB OREXO ORD SHS
summary: Orexo AB is a Swedish pharmaceutical company that develops and commercializes innovative pharmaceuticals to address unmet medical needs, focusing on addiction and pain. Their products leverage proprietary drug delivery technologies. Orexo AB is headquartered in Uppsala, Sweden.

name: FASTIGHETS AB BALDER FASTIGHETS
summary: Fastighets AB Balder is a Swedish real estate company that owns, manages, and develops residential and commercial properties. The company's portfolio is primarily located in major cities in Sweden, Denmark, Norway, and Finland. Fastighets AB Balder is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.

name: INDUTRADE AB INDUTRADE ORD SHS
summary: Indutrade AB is a Swedish industrial technology group that acquires and develops companies in niche technical markets. The company's business model is based on decentralized management and a focus on long-term growth and profitability. Indutrade AB is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: ACCIONA SA ACCIONA ORD SHS
summary: Acciona S.A. is a Spanish conglomerate involved in infrastructure and renewable energy projects. The company designs, constructs, finances, and manages infrastructure projects, including roads, railways, hospitals, and water treatment plants, and is a major player in renewable energy generation, particularly wind power. Acciona is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.

name: SIEMENS GAMESA RENEWABLE ENERGY
summary: Siemens Gamesa Renewable Energy is a Spanish-German wind turbine manufacturer. The company designs, manufactures, and services wind turbines for both onshore and offshore applications. Siemens Gamesa Renewable Energy is headquartered in Zamudio, Spain.

name: JUVENTUS FC SPA JUVENTUS FOOTBA
summary: Juventus Football Club S.p.A. is an Italian professional football club based in Turin, Piedmont. The club is one of the most successful football clubs in Italy and Europe. Juventus FC S.p.A. is headquartered in Turin, Italy.

name: SWEDBANK AB SWEDBANK ORD SHS
summary: Swedbank AB is a Swedish bank that provides a wide range of financial services to individuals, companies, and organizations. The bank operates primarily in Sweden, Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania. Swedbank AB is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: BANKINTER S.A. BANKINTER ORD SH
summary: Bankinter S.A. is a Spanish financial institution that provides banking and financial services to individuals, businesses, and institutions. The bank operates through a network of branches and online channels. Bankinter S.A. is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.

name: ACTIVISION BLIZZARD, INC.
summary: Activision Blizzard, Inc. is an American video game holding company. The company develops and publishes video games across various platforms, including consoles, PCs, and mobile devices. Activision Blizzard is headquartered in Santa Monica, California.

name: Intrum AB
summary: Intrum AB (formerly Intrum Justitia) is a Swedish credit management services company. The company provides services such as debt collection, credit reporting, and payment solutions to businesses in various industries. Intrum AB is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: RWE AG RWE ORD SHS
summary: RWE AG is a German multinational energy company headquartered in Essen. It is one of Germany's largest electricity producers and operates in the generation, trading, and distribution of electricity. The company is transitioning towards renewable energy sources.

name: INDRA SISTEMAS SA INDRA SISTEMA
summary: Indra Sistemas S.A. is a Spanish information technology and defense systems company. The company provides consulting, technology, and engineering services to various sectors, including defense, security, transport, energy, and financial services. Indra Sistemas S.A. is headquartered in Alcobendas, Spain.

name: Fomento de Construcciones y Contratas, S.A.
summary: Fomento de Construcciones y Contratas, S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the environmental services, water management, infrastructure development, and real estate businesses in Europe and internationally. The company offers collection, treatment, recycling, energy recovery and elimination of urban solid waste; cleaning of public roads; maintenance of sewage networks; conservation of green areas; maintenance and cleaning of buildings and facilities; treatment and disposal of industrial waste; recovery of contaminated soils; and facility and industrial waste management. It also provides municipal water services; industrial; and water infrastructures. In addition, the company undertakes infrastructure works and building construction such as roads, railway infrastructures, airport, hydraulic, maritime works, tunnels, bridges, and residential and non-residential building, as well as refurbishing and maintenance works; produces cement, concrete, aggregate, and mortar; industrial projects; and develops, finances, manages, and operates social infrastructure and transportation concessions. name: BENETEAU SA BENETEAU ORD SHS

The company's brands include Beneteau, Jeanneau, Lagoon, and Prestige, catering to various segments of the recreational boating market. Beneteau is headquartered in Saint-Gilles-Croix-de-Vie, France

name: Derichebourg SA
summary: Derichebourg SA is a French-based company providing environmental services, facility management, and staffing solutions. Its environmental services include recycling, waste management, and industrial cleaning. The company is headquartered in Paris, France

name: CREDITO EMILIANO SPA CREDITO EM
summary: Credito Emiliano SpA (Credem) is an Italian banking group providing a range of financial services to individuals, small businesses, and corporate clients. Its offerings include retail banking, corporate banking, investment banking, and asset management services. The bank is headquartered in Reggio Emilia, Italy

name: ENCE Energia y Celulosa SA
summary: Ence Energía y Celulosa SA is a Spanish company that produces eucalyptus pulp and generates renewable energy. It operates pulp mills and biomass power plants, focusing on sustainable forest management and energy production. Ence is headquartered in Madrid, Spain

name: Faes Farma, S.A.
summary: FAES FARMA SA is a Spanish pharmaceutical company that develops, manufactures, and markets pharmaceutical products and active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs). Their product portfolio includes prescription and over-the-counter medications, as well as nutritional supplements. FAES FARMA is headquartered in Leioa, Spain

name: Rallye SA
summary: Rallye SA, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the food, non-food e-commerce, and sporting goods retailing business in France and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Food and General Retailing, and Holdings and Other Activities. It operates hypermarkets, supermarkets, and convenience stores. The company conducts its retailing activities in France primarily under the Casino, Monoprix, Franprix, and Vind√É¬©mia banners; food retail activities in Latin America mainly under the GPA food banners, and √É¬âxito, Disco, Devoto, and Libertad banners; and e-commerce comprising Cdiscount and the Cnova N.V. holding company businesses. It is also involved in financial investment, real estate asset management, property development projects, and energy efficiency activities; and operation of e-commerce sites and self-service restaurants. The company was founded in 1925 and is headquartered in Paris, France. Rallye SA is a subsidiary of Fonciere Euris SA.

name: HUHTAMAKI OYJ HUHTAMAKI ORD SHS
summary: Huhtamäki Oyj is a global packaging company providing sustainable food packaging and serving solutions. The company manufactures and sells a wide range of packaging products, including disposable tableware, containers, and flexible packaging, serving the foodservice, retail, and consumer goods industries. Huhtamaki is headquartered in Espoo, Finland

name: Ipsos SA
summary: Ipsos SA is a global market research and consulting firm. The company provides a wide range of research services to help clients understand consumer behavior, market trends, and brand performance. Ipsos is headquartered in Paris, France

name: Nexity SA
summary: Nexity SA is a French real estate company that develops and manages residential and commercial properties. The company offers a range of services including property development, property management, sales, and investment advice. Nexity is headquartered in Paris, France

name: RATOS AB RATOS B ORD SHS
summary: Ratos AB is a Swedish private equity firm that invests in medium-sized unlisted companies in the Nordic region. The firm's investment strategy focuses on companies with strong market positions and growth potential. Ratos is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden

name: RECORDATI INDUSTRIA CHIMICA E F
summary: Recordati Industria Chimica e Farmaceutica S.p.A. is an Italian pharmaceutical company focused on developing and marketing innovative pharmaceutical products, primarily in specialized therapeutic areas including rare diseases. It operates both through direct sales and marketing and through licensing agreements. Recordati is headquartered in Milan, Italy

name: Redes Energeticas Nacionais SA
summary: REN - Redes Energéticas Nacionais, SGPS, S.A. is a Portuguese company that operates the national electricity and natural gas transmission networks. It is responsible for ensuring the reliable and secure transportation of energy throughout Portugal. REN is headquartered in Lisbon, Portugal

name: REXEL SA REXEL STOCK ORD SHS
summary: Rexel SA is a global distributor of electrical supplies and equipment. The company provides a wide range of products and services to electrical contractors, industrial customers, and commercial businesses. Rexel is headquartered in Paris, France

name: Solaria Energia Y Medio Ambienete SA
summary: Solaria Energía y Medio Ambiente SA is a Spanish company engaged in the development, construction, and operation of solar photovoltaic (PV) power plants. The company's business model centers on generating and selling electricity from its solar power assets. Solaria is headquartered in Madrid, Spain

name: TESSENDERLO CHEMIE NV TESSENDER
summary: Tessenderlo Chemie NV is a specialty chemical company that produces a variety of products including sulfur products, fertilizers, and plastic compounds. The company serves a range of industries including agriculture, construction, and automotive. Tessenderlo Chemie is headquartered in Brussels, Belgium

name: Barco NV
summary: Barco NV, together with its subsidiaries, develops visualization solutions for the entertainment, enterprise, and healthcare markets worldwide. The company operates through three divisions: Entertainment, Enterprise, and Healthcare. It offers cinema, installation, postproduction, rental, simulation, and virtual reality projectors; presentation switchers and screen management systems, scalers, cards, and controllers; LED image processing and indoor LED displays; and laser, LCD, LED rear-projection, and LED video walls, as well as video wall controllers and upgrade kits. The company also provides wireless conferencing and presentation systems. In addition, it offers 3D sound products; options and accessories, such as boards/cards, lamps, lenses, mechanics, sensors, and others; cinema software and control room collaboration systems; visual display systems comprising canvas, caves, power walls, reconfigurable displays, and transportable caves; and a portfolio of support, maintenance, training, and professional services. Further, the company provides critical decision-making solutions, such as breakout and control rooms, field workers, and operators; networked solutions for education, meetings, trainings, and operating rooms; operational collaboration systems; and AV streaming for encoders and decoders, and software clients. Additionally, it offers software products for clinical collaboration; and medical display systems, as well as solutions for operating rooms. Barco NV was founded in 1934 and is headquartered in Kortrijk, Belgium.

name: MUENCHENER RUECKVERSICHERUNGS G
summary: Münchener Rückversicherungs-Gesellschaft Aktiengesellschaft in München (Munich Re) is a leading global reinsurer, providing reinsurance, primary insurance, and insurance-related risk solutions. The company's reinsurance business covers a wide range of risks, including property-casualty, life, and health. Munich Re is headquartered in Munich, Germany

name: TIETO OYJ TIETO ORD SHS
summary: TIETO OYJ TIETO ORD SHS is likely referring to TietoEVRY, a Finnish-based IT services and software company. TietoEVRY provides a range of services, including consulting, system integration, and application management. The company serves customers in the Nordic countries and globally.

name: Geox S.p.A.
summary: GEOX S.p.A. is an Italian footwear and apparel company known for its patented breathable and waterproof technology. The company designs, manufactures, and distributes shoes and clothing for men, women, and children. GEOX is headquartered in Montebelluna, Italy

name: Uponor Oyj
summary: Uponor Oyj provides plumbing, indoor climate, and infrastructure solutions in Europe and North America. The company operates through three segments: Building Solutions √Ç¬ñ Europe, Building Solutions √Ç¬ñ North America, and Uponor Infra. It offers drinking water delivery systems, including plastic plumbing pipe systems, multi-layer composite pipe systems for residential buildings, commercial and public buildings; underfloor heating and cooling, floor integrated underfloor heating systems, water based floor heating, electric underfloor heating for new buildings and renovation projects; wall heating and cooling systems radiant heating and cooling via the wall, for wet and dry plaster installation systems in new buildings and renovation projects. The company also provides ceiling heating and cooling for offices, sales areas, industrial buildings, and sports halls; room and supply temperature controls; flexible ecoflex pre-insulated pipes; prefabricated modules for plumbing and heating; heating and cooling products for projects; and radiator connections. Uponor Oyj was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Vantaa, Finland.

name: Tomra Systems ASA
summary: Tomra Systems ASA provides sensor-based solutions for optimal resource productivity worldwide. It operates through three divisions: Collection Solutions, Recycling Mining, and Food Solutions. The Collection Solutions division engages in the development, production, rental, sale, and service of reverse vending machines and related data management systems. This segment is also involved in picking up, transporting, and processing empty beverage containers on behalf of beverage producers/fillers. The Recycling Mining division offers sorting systems for waste and metal material streams; and ore sorting systems for the mining industry. The Food Solutions division provides sorting and processing technology for the fresh and processed food industries. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Asker, Norway.

name: KLOECKNER & CO SE KLOECKNER & C
summary: Klöckner & Co SE is a German-based independent distributor of steel and metal products and one of the leading producers in the steel industry. The company provides a range of products and services including warehousing, processing, and distribution. Klöckner & Co is headquartered in Duisburg, Germany

name: GRUPO EMPRESARIAL SAN JOSE SA G
summary: GRUPO EMPRESARIAL SAN JOSE SA G is a Spanish construction and real estate company. They are involved in the development of residential, commercial, and infrastructure projects. Grupo Empresarial San José operates primarily in Spain and Portugal.

name: VALE SA VALE ADR REPRESENTING O
summary: Vale S.A. is a global mining company based in Brazil, engaged in the production and export of iron ore, nickel, copper, coal, manganese, ferroalloys, and other minerals. The company also operates in the logistics, energy, and steel industries. Vale is headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil

name: TERNA RETE ELETTRICA NAZIONALE
